data.author: ijnek
data.message: starting with a default package generated by ros2 pkg create

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(soccer_interfaces)
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+# uncomment the following section in order to fill in
+# further dependencies manually.
+# find_package(<dependency> REQUIRED)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  # the following line skips the linter which checks for copyrights
+  # uncomment the line when a copyright and license is not present in all source files
+  #set(ament_cmake_copyright_FOUND TRUE)
+  # the following line skips cpplint (only works in a git repo)
+  # uncomment the line when this package is not in a git repo
+  #set(ament_cmake_cpplint_FOUND TRUE)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>soccer_interfaces</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>TODO: Package description</description>
+  <maintainer email="kenjibrameld@gmail.com">ijnek</maintainer>
+  <license>TODO: License declaration</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
+  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+  </export>
+</package>

data.author: jaagut
data.message:
Merge pull request #7 from ijnek/kenji-ball

use CONFIDENCE_UNKNOWN(-1) for confidence in Ball.msg

files.patch:
@@ -1,17 +1,15 @@
 # Describes a detected ball from vision modules, in image coordinates.
 
+float32 CONFIDENCE_UNKNOWN=-1
+
 # A bounding box that surrounds the ball in the image, this does not have to include
 # the whole ball, but only the part of the ball that was detected.
 vision_msgs/BoundingBox2D bb
 
 # Center point of the ball, the z-axis should be ignored (in pixel)
 geometry_msgs/Point center
 
-# Whether the ball has a confidence value associated.
-bool has_confidence
-
-# NOTE: only used if has_confidence is true
-# A confidence rating between 0 and 1, used if has_confidence is true.
+# A confidence rating between 0 and 1, or -1(CONFIDENCE_UNKNOWN) by default.
 # 0 - ball detection module is 0% sure it is a ball.
 # 1 - ball detection module is 100% sure it is a ball.
-float32 confidence
\ No newline at end of file
+float32 confidence -1
